description:
Letter/petition to Najīb(?) al-Dawla. In Arabic script. The sender reports that he came to the addressee's house but was not able to do something. He has sent him the news from the letter that arrived with Abū l-Ṭayyib. Abū Naṣr should read the letter. He asks the addressee to wait for him, or else to go to the house of the Raʾīs, whiuch Abū Salīm(?) had requested from the sender. Includes multiple variants of raʾy clauses. 

Surrounded by accounts in Arabic script mentioning names such as ʿAllūn, Mūsā b. [...], al-muʿallim Yahūdhā (Yehuda), al-Andalusī, Yūsuf b. Isḥāq.

The date should be identifiable based on the calendar on recto.
